title: Top 50 Twitch Channels by Followers (2026)
subtitle: Follower counts for the top 50 most followed Twitch channels
description:
A quick dataset I made while looking into live streaming platform stats. Covers the top 50 Twitch channels ranked by followers as of early April 2026.

Simple layout - rank, channel name, and follower count. Good for bar charts, ranking visualizations, or combining with YouTube/TikTok data for a cross-platform dashboard.

The list is mostly gaming and IRL streamers with a few org channels like Riot Games and ESL mixed in.

resources.description: Top 50 Twitch channels with follower counts
